message:
fix(wizard): correct stdin empty detection for pipes

stat.Size() always returns 0 for pipes even when they have data
available to read. The previous check incorrectly treated piped
input as empty, causing the wizard to exit early with "wizard
requires interactive input; stdin is empty" even when input was
provided.

Fix: Only check Size() for regular files, not pipes. For pipes,
let the huh library handle the empty input case.
